markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 3+ hits in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 5+

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 4+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 3+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Victor Caratini: 3+ hits + runs + RBIs?

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 1+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

If Isaac Paredes is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.

If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 3+ hits in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Victor Caratini: 3+ hits?
markets.yes_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 3+

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 2+ hits in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.yes_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 2+

markets.no_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 1+ hits in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Victor Caratini: 1+ hits?
markets.yes_sub_title: Victor Caratini: 1+

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Isaac Paredes is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Isaac Paredes starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Isaac Paredes is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Isaac Paredes is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Isaac Paredes: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Isaac Paredes records 1+ home runs in Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Isaac Paredes is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Isaac Paredes starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Isaac Paredes is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Isaac Paredes is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 1+ home runs in Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
